parents.subject: LU-14920 llite: Disable parallel dio by default

commit.subject: LU-14920 tests: Additional debug and testing
commit.message:
LU-14920 tests: Additional debug and testing

This is purely to have some additional debug and testing
for the bug documented in LU-14920.

This is based on a patch which disables parallel i/o,
testing that idea.

Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Iaa627e2c193541780245868450f64827331edb08
